$schema-comment: Parity fixtures for assembleDraft() — every platform must produce byte-identical output for each case.

cases.name: missed-passenger-assist-alone

template.title: Missed Passenger Assist
template.header: I am writing to complain about a failure to provide Passenger Assist on a journey with {{operator}} on {{date}} at {{location}}.
template.legalParagraph: Operators are required under the Accessible Travel Policy framework (overseen by the ORR) and the Equality Act 2010 to provide reliable, pre-booked assistance and to make reasonable adjustments. A failure to provide booked assistance is a service failure under your ATP and may constitute a breach of duty under the Equality Act 2010.
template.ask: I would like a full investigation, a written explanation within 20 working days, the appropriate compensation under your Passenger Assist policy, and confirmation of the corrective action taken to prevent this from happening again.

cases.expected:
# Missed Passenger Assist

I am writing to complain about a failure to provide Passenger Assist on a journey with Avanti West Coast on 2026-05-24 at the location described above.

## What happened

- Date: 2026-05-24.
- Operator: Avanti West Coast.
- Travelling alone.

## About me

No specific accessibility profile shared for this complaint.

## Legal context

Operators are required under the Accessible Travel Policy framework (overseen by the ORR) and the Equality Act 2010 to provide reliable, pre-booked assistance and to make reasonable adjustments. A failure to provide booked assistance is a service failure under your ATP and may constitute a breach of duty under the Equality Act 2010.

## What I want

I would like a full investigation, a written explanation within 20 working days, the appropriate compensation under your Passenger Assist policy, and confirmation of the corrective action taken to prevent this from happening again.

cases.name: step-free-blocked-with-companion-and-profile

template.title: Inaccessible Facility
template.header: I am writing about an inaccessible facility on a journey with {{operator}} on {{date}}.
template.legalParagraph: Reasonable adjustments are required under the Equality Act 2010.
template.ask: Please investigate and confirm the corrective action taken.

facts.staffInteractions: spoke to two members of platform staff
facts.narrative: Step-free route was blocked by maintenance work

cases.expected:
# Inaccessible Facility

I am writing about an inaccessible facility on a journey with Northern on 2026-05-20.

## What happened

- Date: 2026-05-20.
- Operator: Northern.
- Travelling with a companion.
- Staff interactions: spoke to two members of platform staff.
- Witnesses: one other passenger.
- Waited approximately 45 minutes.
- Summary: Step-free route was blocked by maintenance work.

## About me

- Powered wheelchair user.
- Hard of hearing.
- Needs extra time.

## Legal context

Reasonable adjustments are required under the Equality Act 2010.

## What I want

Please investigate and confirm the corrective action taken.
